title: Hushkey
tagline: Property and jobs in Japan, surfaced in English
description: Japan-focused — property and job listings opened up to foreigners, with built-in Japanese ↔ English translation (no third-party APIs), operators running the market side, payments via Dodo Payments.

title: Howl
description: A Fresh-derived framework with file-system routing, file-system APIs, single-pass SSR, and a typed islands runtime.

title: Hound
description: Sorted-set delivery, crash recovery, cron, type-safe emit, and an HTTP/WS gateway — a single package on a single Redis connection. Benchmarks at ~34k jobs/s peak on a single local Redis.
